channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Cozy god game Ornelia announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Nurture a world with kindness.

Lyon-based developer Gameleon Studio has announced Ornelia, a village builder and god game that “redefines the genre.” It will launch first in Early Access for PC via Steam. A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Gameleon Studio:

About

Ornelia is a village builder and benevolent god game that redefines the genre through the lens of care and creation. Arriving soon on Steam Early Access, Ornelia invites players to step into a living, breathing world where their every act of kindness literally powers the landscape.

A God Game Where Goodness is Your Greatest Power

In Ornelia, you aren’t a distant deity—you are a hands-on guardian of the Kinous, adorable and expressive creatures who live under the shade of the great Kiskanu tree. Unlike traditional god games that focus on destruction or conquest, Ornelia is built entirely on benevolent agency. Your kindness is the engine of progress; each night, the great tree draws strength from the care you’ve shown your village, glowing brighter as your community flourishes.

As a guardian, your influence is tactile. You can physically intervene in the world—picking up Kinous to help them along, triggering small miracles to clear paths, or reshaping the space around them in real-time. The Kinous are deeply aware of your presence; they use emotes, ask for guidance, and celebrate the milestones of the village you build together.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Creation at Your Own Pace

Ornelia will launch into Early Access with Create Mode, a creative sanctuary where players can plan, build, and grow their village without the pressure of a ticking clock. Whether you are designing for peak efficiency or purely for aesthetic beauty, the village-building mechanics allow for deep personalization, ensuring every town is a unique reflection of its guardian’s style.

Looking toward the 1.0 release, players can also look forward to an Adventure Mode, a narrative journey where your kindness becomes a weapon. In this mode, players will embark on a mission to restore the Kiskanu tree to its full glory by pushing back the encroaching “Black Mass,” a shadow that threatens the peace of the world.

Key Features

  • Craft Your Cozy Village – Total freedom to choose what to build and where to place it. Create a village that balances efficiency with your own personal design flair.
  • A Living World in Your Care – Watch the Kinous react to your choices in real-time. Use the zoom feature to see their tiny celebrations and individual personalities up close.
  • Tactile Godhood – A hands-on approach to divinity. Physically interact with the world and its inhabitants to perform “good-only” miracles.
  • Two Ways to Play – Jump into Endless Mode for a pure creative sandbox in Early Access, or prepare for the upcoming Adventure Mode to restore the world from the Black Mass.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/cozy-god-game-ornelia-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Wild Blue Skies launches August 13 for PS5, Xbox Series, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

On-rails shooter dated.

On-rails shooter Wild Blue Skies will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam on XXX, publisher Balor Games and developers Chuhai Labs and VITEI Backroom announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

A modern take on the classic on-rail adventures of the ’90s.

Soar over oceans, desert ridges, and perilous caves, battling waves of enemies and pushing back Grimclaw’s forces. With the help of allies, you’ll fight to restore peace while experiencing the thrill of classic arcade flight-combat!

Blue Bombers Reporting for Duty.

Easy-to-learn controls make Wild Blue Skies accessible for newcomers and genre veterans alike, while the game’s stunning visuals immerse you in a hand-crafted, anime-style universe. With its compelling gameplay loop, branching paths, and thrilling missions, every flight is an adventure!

Key Features

  • Never Fly Alone – Fly through an action-packed campaign alongside a stalwart squad of allies.
  • Old-School Arcade Thrills – Experience all the classic on-rails shooter action with new and modernized controls.
  • Fly Like an Ace – Become an ace pilot and master every mission through a simple and challenging score system.
  • Battle for the Skies– Take on exciting boss battles and dogfights against a mysterious rival squad.
  • Stunning Horizons – Discover a rich and colorful world with stunning vistas at every turn.
  • Explore Every Path – Discover secret paths and missions on your quest to take down the evil Grimclaw.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/wild-blue-skies-launches-august-13-for-ps5-xbox-series-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: 3D dark fantasy shoot ’em up Bracer announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Chaos, companionship, and customization.

Publisher Akupara Games and developer Curious Fate have announced 3D dark fantasy shoot ’em up game Bracer. It will be available for PC via Steam. A release date was not announced.

“The idea for Bracer came about while thinking about games that would be fun to create and play at every stage of development, from prototyping to playtesting to shipping,” said developer Jason Shields in a press release. “Something about the fast-paced SHMUP genre felt perfect. The classics tend to be focused around spaceships, but I wanted to see what bringing a Fantasy twist would look like. Adding a bit of depth with a story, shops, skill trees, a free-roam area, and Bracer was born.”

  • ❮
  • ❯

Here is an overview of the game, via Akupara Games:

About

Bracer is a 3D fantasy shoot ’em up where players will face off against a twisted necromancer fueled by a cursed bracer and a bloodlust for destruction. Players won’t have to face this challenge alone, as Bracer supports couch coop allowing you and your mighty comrade to mix and match your skills, abilities, weapons, and classes, all while traveling across swamps, forests, gothic cities and astral planes.

Akin to old-school shoot ’em up mechanics, players will make their way through an endless barrage of encounters, blasting enemies, dodging projectiles, and unlocking upgrades. Whether that be in a full-fledged story campaign or through the relentless “Endless Dungeon” mode, Bracer aims to raise the stakes and put the world’s safety in their hands. Do you have what it takes to halt the apocalypse or will you falter at its wretched feet?

A necrotic curse spreads across the land. At its heart, a malevolent bracer, worn by a once-familiar figure. The sickness has spread. The sacred tree of life has been twisted into the dreaded tree of death, spawning armies of undead from its wretched underground tendrils. To face this threat are three heroes—an intrepid Knight, a mysterious Wizard, and a relentless Bounty Hunter, each with their own motivations for pursuing our villain and ending his corruption.

Safety is an illusion: Waves of enemies, hazards, and projectiles advance without pause, turning every encounter into a dance of blasting, dodging, looting, and slashing. Battle through the monstrous hoards in a dark, gothic and deadly world. Forward motion is your greatest enemy, and… your only path to victory.

Key Features

  • Fantasy Shoot ‘Em Up Reborn – Fast-paced, classic shoot ’em up gameplay with endless twists. Dodge necrotic forces, weave through enemy fire, and fight through a dark, gothic world.
  • RPG Progression and Customization – Collect gold, unlock powerful skills on an in-depth skill tree, and purchase vital weapon upgrades to customize your play. Bring one of 11 unique player pets into battle and personalize your look with character, pet, and weapon cosmetics.
  • Couch Cooperative Carnage – Don’t face the darkness alone! Gather your fellowship for classic local couch cooperative and turn the tide of battle side-by-side with a friend!
  • Story and Endless Modes – Hunt down the Necromancer in the full story mode, or push your limits in Endless Dungeon Mode. Both paths feature unique rewards and progression flows.
  • True Realm Mastery – Progress through multiple difficulty settings that fundamentally change the game, adding extra hazards and denser enemy hordes. Prove your skills by defeating challenging bosses, completing level objectives, and best your ranks and high scores in all modes.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_QeiFwQa3R0



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/3d-dark-fantasy-shoot-em-up-bracer-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Survival psychological horror game Where Dolls Hang announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Investigate a place plagued by strange and unsettling events.

Steelkrill Studio has announced Where Dolls Hang, a first-person survival psychological horror game where you investigate a place plagued by strange and unsettling events filled with hanging dolls. It will be available for PC via Steam. A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Where Dolls Hang is a first-person horror experience that blends boats, paranormal hunting, investigation, survival, and psychological horror as you have to investigate and survive. Deep within a Forest, bodies have been washing ashore for years with no explanation. Now, it’s time to uncover the truth that’s hidden within.

Where Dolls Hang is a psychological horror mystery connected to the legend of the Island where dolls hang.

After uncovering disturbing information linked to the island, an obsession with its history begins to take hold. Strange events soon spread throughout the house, transforming familiar surroundings into a nightmare where reality, memory, and superstition become impossible to separate. Explore an ever-changing environment, uncover hidden clues, solve puzzles, and piece together a dark mystery rooted in folklore and unexplained events.

As the truth slowly emerges, every discovery brings new questions—and new horrors.

Survival is just as important. Manage your inventory space, resources, build campfires to stay safe through the night, and craft weapons to defend yourself against whatever roams the wetlands. You won’t always be strong enough to fight—as sometimes running and hiding is the only option.

Between expeditions, you can go to your safehouse where you can organize your supplies, store your findings, and upgrade to prepare for what’s ahead. It’s the only place that offers a brief sense of control in an uncontrollable environment.

A day and night cycle affects both visibility and danger. Raining can cause visibility issues, but monsters won’t be able to hear you. What feels manageable in daylight becomes something far more hostile after dark. Scattered VHS tapes reveals clues. Watch them closely. They may be the only way to understand what’s happening… and what’s waiting for you. Because you are not alone. Something is alive in the forest.

Key Features

  • Explore and document your findings, examine bodies, find clues, mark and put bodies in body bags.
  • You don’t only investigate on lands, but also in your boat; swamp, forests and other areas at your own pace.
  • Inventory Management: Manage your inventory with grid-based system, where every space counts.
  • Craft fires to heal, scavenge for supplies, and find lockpicks to open new paths and uncover useful items.

Prepare to confront your deepest fears. As reality begins to unravel, every answer uncovers a more disturbing question. What starts as a search for the truth soon becomes a descent into obsession, paranoia, and something far beyond understanding.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/survival-psychological-horror-game-where-dolls-hang-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Hakuoki Memoirs: Drifting Clouds coming west in early 2027
item.content:encoded:
• Switch

Physical edition pre-orders open on June 4.

eastasiasoft will release otome visual novel Hakuoki Memoirs: Drifting Clouds for Switch in English in early 2027, the publisher announced. Pre-orders for physical editions will open via Play-Asia starting June 4 at 8:00 a.m. PT / 11:00 a.m. ET. (You can also save five percent with our multi-use “GEMATSU2025” coupon code.)

Only 2,000 limited editions will be produced, which will include the game, manual, drama CD, art book, acrylic character standees, Joy-Con sticker set, poster, and a numbered certificate in a collector’s box.

Hakuoki Memoirs: Drifting Clouds first launched for Switch on October 6, 2022 in Japan, where it is titled Hakuouki Shinkai: Ten’un no Shou.

Here is an overview of the game, via eastasiasoft:

About

Reunite with beloved characters and get to know them like you never have before! Hakuoki Memoirs: Drifting Clouds is a “fan disc” expansion to the romantic tale of heroine Chizuru and the handsome warriors of the Shinsengumi. Explore a variety of character-focused vignettes set between the chapters of Hakuoki: Chronicles of Wind and Blossom and make key decisions for Chizuru along the way.

Previously unseen events and moments of romance unfold in gorgeously illustrated style! Engage in sweet, funny, lighthearted and sometimes surprising dialogue localized in English for the first time and immerse yourself in authentic settings inspired by the history of Japan’s Edo period. As an essential new supplement to the series’ core narrative, Hakuoki Memoirs: Drifting Clouds becomes an essential part of the definitive Hakuoki experience!

Key Features

  • Take the role of Chizuru as she’s surrounded by familiar faces!
  • Explore events and romantic scenarios set between the series’ original chapters.
  • Make key choices and discover unique story routes!
  • Enjoy voiceovers in Japanese and newly localized text in English.
  • Navigate with ease using a variety of user interface controls and preferences!

Watch the opening movie below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Opening Movie

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/hakuoki-memoirs-drifting-clouds-coming-west-in-early-2027
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
